**Kannapolis City Schools** is a local education agency headquartered in [Kannapolis, North Carolina](/wiki/Kannapolis,_North_Carolina "Kannapolis, North Carolina"). It encompasses parts of [Cabarrus](/wiki/Cabarrus_County,_North_Carolina "Cabarrus County, North Carolina") and [Rowan](/wiki/Rowan_County,_North_Carolina "Rowan County, North Carolina") Counties, yet operates independently of both county-wide school systems. This is a legacy of the fact that Kannapolis was originally a [company town](/wiki/Company_town "Company town") for [Cannon Mills](/wiki/Cannon_Mills "Cannon Mills") (Kannapolis was not incorporated as a city until 1984).

## Schools

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Kannapolis_City_Schools&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Schools")]

### Grades K-12

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Kannapolis_City_Schools&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Grades K-12")]

* Grades K-5: **G.W. Carver Elementary School** (Founded 2017), building was previously used for Kannapolis Middle School and Kannapolis Intermediate School)
* Grades 6-8: **Kannapolis Middle School** (Eagles; kelly green and navy blue) (founded 1981, moved to current facility in 2005)
* Grades 9-12: **[A.L. Brown High School](/wiki/A.L._Brown_High_School "A.L. Brown High School")** (Wonders; [kelly green](/wiki/Kelly_green "Kelly green") and White) (founded 1924 as J. W. Cannon High School, renamed and moved to current facility in 1952)

**Elementary Schools**

* Forest Park Elementary
* Shady Brook Elementary
* Jackson Park Elementary
* Fred L. Wilson Elementary
* North Kannapolis Elementary (formerly Woodrow Wilson)
* G.W. Carver Elementary School

## New policies (2017)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Kannapolis_City_Schools&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: New policies (2017)")]

In 2017–2018 school year, Kannapolis opened a new part of the middle school. Now the upper building houses 6th grade and the lower building houses 7th and 8th. The elementary schools now house k-5 again. The former intermediate school has been renamed George Washington Carver, and is an Arts magnet elementary school.
